scripts.dev: concurrently -n frontend,backend -c blue,green "npm run dev --workspace frontend" "npm run dev --workspace backend"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace frontend && npm run build --workspace backend
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace frontend && npm run lint --workspace backend
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace backend && npm run test --workspace frontend
scripts.test:coverage: npm run test:backend -- --coverage && npm run test:frontend -- --coverage
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace frontend && npm run typecheck --workspace backend
